subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto them that have believed in God, the All-Protecting, the Self-Subsisting, that they may find tranquility through the grace of their Lord and arise in service [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن آمن بالله المهیمن القیوم لیطمئن بفضل مولاه و یقوم علی خدمه
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @wisdom [hikmat], @praise and encouragement
